version_pin_rationale: libpcre3 8.39-13ubuntu0.22.04.1 (PCRE 1.x ABI) is the jammy security-pocket build. CASCADE-E DEPENDENCY: sway DT_NEEDED libpcre.so.3 (via libglib-2.0); R9 base ships libpcre2-8.so.0 (PCRE 2 ABI) but NOT the older PCRE 1 ABI. Distinct from libpcre2-8 (which is in R9 base for systemd); the glib2 stack standardised on PCRE 1.x in jammy. Lives under /lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/ (not /usr/lib/) because PCRE was historically considered an early-init dep; the .deb preserves that legacy path.
